content.text: How can I retrieve the IDs of all configured notification channels or filter them based on specific criteria using an SDLC API?
If I provide a set of filters that don't match any configured channels, what exact output structure will the function return?

Since it must confirm each provided filter exists, if a channel definition is not found, it returns False and an error message: `(False, 'Channel not found: [channel]')`. If all checks pass but no matches are found, it continues and may return an empty list depending on the iteration path.
